name: Chicken Lasagna
method: Boil the noodles in a pot of salted water for 10 minutes, until they are done. Drain the noodles and set aside.
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet and sauté the mushrooms, bell pepper, onion, and garlic for 5 minutes.
Combine the shredded chicken, broth, cream cheese, mushrooms, bell pepper, onion, garlic, and oregano in a bowl.
Stir in 1 cup mozzarella cheese and season with salt and pepper.
Pour 1 cup of tomato sauce into a 9x13 baking dish.
Create three layers of lasagna noodles, chicken mixture, and tomato sauce.
Top with the remaining cup of shredded mozzarella cheese.
